sentences.arabic: بِرُّ الْوَالِدَيْنِ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ الْأَعْمَالِ عِنْدَ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Dobročinstvo prema roditeljima je jedno od najvećih djela kod Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Kindness to parents is one of the greatest deeds in the sight of Allah.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَسَأَلَهُ: مَنْ أَحَقُّ النَّاسِ بِحُسْنِ صَحَابَتِي؟
sentences.translation: Došao je čovjek Vjerovjesniku, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, i upitao ga: 'Ko je najpreči mom lijepom ophođenju?'
sentences.translationEn: A man came to the Prophet (peace be upon him) and asked: 'Who is most deserving of my good companionship?'

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: «أُمُّكَ، ثُمَّ أُمُّكَ، ثُمَّ أُمُّكَ، ثُمَّ أَبُوكَ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، حَدِيثُ ٥٩٧١].
sentences.translation: Rekao je: 'Tvoja majka, zatim tvoja majka, zatim tvoja majka, pa onda tvoj otac' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: He said: 'Your mother, then your mother, then your mother, then your father' [Reported by al-Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: نَتَعَلَّمُ مِنْ هَذَا الْحَدِيثِ أَهَمِّيَّةَ طَاعَةِ الْوَالِدَيْنِ وَتَقْدِيرِ الْأُمِّ.
sentences.translation: Iz ovog hadisa učimo o važnosti poslušnosti roditeljima i uvažavanju majke.
sentences.translationEn: We learn from this hadith the importance of obeying parents and appreciating the mother.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ الصَّالِحُ يُسَاعِدُ وَالِدَيْهِ وَيَتَحَدَّثُ مَعَهُمَا بِأَدَبٍ وَلُطْفٍ.
sentences.translation: Dobar musliman pomaže svojim roditeljima i razgovara s njima učtivo i ljubazno.
sentences.translationEn: A righteous Muslim helps his parents and speaks to them with politeness and kindness.

sentences.translation: Allahovo zadovoljstvo je u zadovoljstvu roditelja.
sentences.translationEn: Allah's pleasure is in the pleasure of the parents.
